{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603231743297C71C0597ACCA950AE47"}"},"total":2982},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7401492087076340542","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"很喜欢的，可能我看的太多，这种类型的也看腻了点，全书一共19个小故事，每个故事的男女主不变，但是真的好甜啊，变着法在撒糖，对于我来讲，我最喜欢的就是第一个小故事，校霸和学霸的爱情，从学生到恋人到家人再到结婚生子这是一个很美好的过程，真的超喜欢第一个故事[害羞][害羞]
这本书对我的感触挺深的，在这本书前，我刚刚看完了一本虐文，全虐的那种，结果第那一本是虐到哭人，这一本是甜到磕晕，我也感觉我心情转变的挺快的，感谢这本书带给我的快乐，希望作者的下本书，我还可以再看吧[害羞]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1723296630,"group_id":"7179524932349463609","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"做自己就好啦（｡ò ∀ ó｡）","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N7KfNb/B9s0A126BYUcS400=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/1fcd5f0c2ec14fe88ad8c6587d044e50~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776795806&x-signature=XAR5%2Bx10qfET%2BRzsVw07%2FQpKoQg%3D","user_id":"994437043326456","user_name":"婷.崽๑"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"994437043326456","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":0,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E1DDFF","can_worn":false,"id":5,"name":"前排催更","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/dda89d247c75fa9dfdf08a80bd508401","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b9a497dac48a9ee6b81051a70c630d0f"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7179524932349463609","book_info":{"abstract":"【男主向+快穿+HE+1v1】
甜文！甜文！小甜文！轻剧情，重感情！重要的事说三遍！
写作新手，不喜勿入！不爱请别伤害！
许星河，前世有钱有颜有势就是单身。不料一朝车祸后穿书了，还绑定了一个拯救女配系统。受莫名干扰，总有女配仿若被下了降头结局凄惨，许星河只有不断穿越不同小世界，成功拯救命定女配，才能真正获得重生。
（PS：所有小世界中，男主的对象都是同一人。）
世界1:不良校霸vs黑化邻家女孩
世界2:霸道总裁vs十八线替身小女星
世界3:忠犬骑士vs亡国公主
世界4:末日丧尸王vs炮灰路人女配
世界5:民国少帅vs真假千金
世界6:妖仙vs异瞳少女
世界7:反派富家子弟vs年上教授女友
世界8:倒霉蛋师尊vs工具人弟子
世界9:偏执哥哥vs懂事妹妹
世界10:残疾小侯爷vs贴身影卫
世界11:社恐肥宅vs美女房东
世界12:卧底武警vs惨遭不测女大学生
世界13:唱跳双废男团门面vs多才多艺元气偶像
世界14:流浪吸血鬼vs替身祭品
世界15:兽世森蚺vs穿越猛女
世界16:冤种男二vs女扮男装好“兄弟”
世界17:天灾圣母男vs善良软心妻
世界18:原世界
世界19:星际","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/5dece853b42136b40e82dbf240e5d4ad","author":"银河里的月亮","author_id":"","book_id":"7179524932349463609","book_name":"快穿：我的老婆是女配","book_short_name":"千渡揽星梦","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#d0a8a8","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2.9万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":24,"name":"快穿","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=24&name=快穿&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":3,"name":"现代言情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=3&name=现代言情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":29,"name":"总裁","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=29&name=总裁&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":32,"name":"幻想言情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=32&name=幻想言情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":4,"name":"校园","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=4&name=校园&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":43,"name":"娱乐圈","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=43&name=娱乐圈&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":382,"name":"穿书","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=382&name=穿书&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":473,"name":"豪门世家","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=473&name=豪门世家&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":484,"name":"HE","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=484&name=HE&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":486,"name":"明星","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=486&name=明星&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":834,"name":"1v1","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=834&name=1v1&genre_type 友善配角和反派安排得有松有驰不会疲劳，而且男主性格有稍微贴近本位面原身ooc几乎0，且比较淡定，不像一些男快穿男主有种流里流气沉不住气的屌丝感，非常戳我。","text_exts":[{"e":44,"s":42,"text":"舒畅","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E8%88%92%E7%95%85&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774259009A950AE47%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227193683232750240523%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227179524932349463609%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E8%88%92%E7%95%85%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1674909991,"group_id":"7179524932349463609","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N6AV1UIRCMRUYXIgldhlHm9eWkLnFJNlozam0STGCL82","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/ebac52bb25a24bfeafbca74e4ba111db~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776792199&x-signature=EPyHi9fCjlsBVZEtMj18vYJxva8%3D","user_id":"3342988927848247","user_name":"我sjb别管我了我悔"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3342988927848247","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1741342258,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E4F5CD","can_worn":false,"id":3,"name":"烂尾督察员","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/972e1bec4437ce8e045aaf8e3bbfe1aa","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/47aabaca7b644a2b0eb9d35477c6d9df"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7179524932349463609","book_info":{"abstract":"【男主向+快穿+HE+1v1】
